titleStmt.title: SII 27.43: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 43. (A.R. No. 534 of 1920-30.) BAINDŪR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in a field on the way to the ruined basti at Hōsāḍu, a quarter of the same village.
This slightly damaged record is dated Śaka 1278, Durmukhi, Bhādrapada śu. 10, Sunday corresponding to 1356 A.D., September 4.

It registers gift of lands by mahāpradhāna Malleya-daṇṇāyaka which were received by him from Ajjapparasa and Vīra-Nāraṇaseṭṭi of Baindūr and Kañchiya-nāyaka, son-in-law of Bammu-haḍavaḷa and another piece of land purchased from Yiṁchaṇṇa, son of Vandarasēnabōva to the temple of Gōkarṇēśvara-Mārttāṇḍēśvara for conducting Rudrapūja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē trailōka naga
rāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāyaśaṁbhavē . svastiśrī vija
yābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1278 durmukhi bhādrapa
da śu¬10 Ā śrīmanumahāmaṁḍalēsvaraṁ Arirāya vibā
ḍa bhāsege tappuvarāyaragaṁḍa śrīvīrabukkaṁṇa voḍeyara rājyābhyu
dayadalu śrīmanumahā pradhānaṁ malleya daṁṇnā yakaru gōkarṇṇē
svara mārtaṇḍēsvara dēvarali mūṟu rudrapūje Ācaṁdrārkaṁ
na ḍevaṁtāgi bāḷanu sērisikoṭu barasida silāśāsanada kramaveṁtaṁdare do
dūra Ajappa Arasaniṁda tanage dānavāgi baṁdadu baiṁdoralu tuḷu
veya haravariya voḷage baṁdabāḷu Avaṟiyaṁda paḍuvalu haḍuvaṇaseṭṭi
yangaḍiya bacaliṁda baḍagalu Ajjaparasara bāḷiṁdaṁ mūḍalu nāraṇaseṭṭiya bā
ḷa bacaliṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmayoḷaguḷa gaddemūḍe 10 rali taṁbaseṭṭi
yapa baṁkēsvarada dēvasva ceṁmaṇaseṭiya bāḷiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu baṁkēsvara dē
vasvadiṁ baḍagalu baṁkēsvara dēvasvadiṁ mūḍalu ceṁmaṇa seṭiya bāḻiṁdaṁ teṁ
kalu yiṁtī catusīme yoḻaguḻa gademuḍe 6 koḍala gade kaṁ naḍahaḻadiṁ
paḍuvalu bhānudēvara bāḻiṁdaṁ baḍagalu basadiye dēvasva ceṁmaṇaseṭṭiya
bāḻiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baṁkēsvarada yacaṁṇana bāḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catu
ya voḻaguḻa gade moḍe 7 Aṁtu Ajjapparasaniṁda tamagedānavāgi baṁ
da gade mūḍe 22 bayidūra baṁkēsvarada teṁkabhāgada vaṁdarasēnabō
vanamaga yaṁcaṁṇaniṁda krayavāgi baṁdabāḷu kaṁnaḍi haḻadiṁ paḍuva A
jjapparasa maleya daṁṇṇāyakarige koṭa bāḷiṁda baḍagalu ciṁmaṁṇa seṭṭiya
bāḻiṁdaṁ mūḍalu kaṁnaḍihaḻadiṁ teṁkalu yaṁtī catussīme yoḻaguḻa
gademūḍe 4 bayidūra gāvaṇara baḻiya baiṁdūṟa vīra nāraṇaseṭiyaṁda
dānavāgi baṁdabāḻu tuṟugēriyalu Avaṟiyaṁdaṁ paḍuvalu male
ya daṁṇnāyakara haravariyaṁdaṁ baḍagalu nāraṇaseṭṭi kaṁnaḍi
ṭṭe Aṁciṁdaṁ mūḍalu taṁnamaneya hittilu bēliyaṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁ
tī catusīmeyoḻaguḻa gade mūḍe 1 . bayidūra hōda baḻiyaṁ
baṁmuhaḍavaḻina Aḻiya kaṁciyanāyakaniṁda dānavāgi baṁda
mūḍe . Aṁtu nāgaṁḍugada mūḍe 28 Avoḻaguḷa nidhinikṣē
pa jalapāśāṇa siddhasādhya Akṣīṇi Āgāmi Aṣṭabhōga tējasvāmya
sahitavāgi hiraṁṇyōdaka dhārāpūrvvakavāgi maleyadaṁṇnā
yakaru Ā rudrapūje Ācaṁdrārkaṁ naḍavaṁtāgi koṭṭaru Ā bāḷiṁ
Ā maleyadaṁṇnāyakaru
nāgaṁḍugadali
Akkiya mūḍe 30 nū Ārudrapūjege varuṣaṁ prati naḍasi baharu
nāraṇaseṭṭiyaṁda baṁda bāḻiṁda Ānāraṇaseṭṭiyaru
karu kaṁciya nāyakaniṁda baṁda bāḻiṁ Ākaṁciyanāyakaru ṟiyalu
maya caṁṇnaniṁda baṁda bāḷu baṁkēsvaradēvara
Ayicaṁṇa
vāraṇāsiya taṭiyali sāvirakavileyamaḷida dō
ṣadalli hōharu svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harētāvasuṁdharā .
ṣaṣṭirvaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . maṁgaḷa
mahā śrī .
Digital edition of SII 27.43 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
